# seerr_notification_pushbullet (Data Source)

Read Seerr pushbullet notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/pushbullet.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `pushbullet` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pushbullet))
- `types` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--pushbullet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pushbullet`

Read-Only:

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive)
- `channel_tag` (String)
